_comment: Curated Magisk module catalog. Each entry's downloadUrl is the latest-release link from the module's GitHub repo at curation time; update via maintainer smoke-test. User overrides at %LOCALAPPDATA%\AndroidEmulatorPlus\presets\magisk-modules.json with the same schema merge by id.

modules.name: Shamiko
modules.description: Hides Magisk root from app-side detectors. Pairs with Zygisk DenyList for the cleanest hide.

modules.name: LSPosed (Zygisk)
modules.description: Xposed-style runtime patching framework. Requires Zygisk enabled in Magisk settings.

modules.name: Play Integrity Fork
modules.description: Spoofs Play Integrity device verdict to passing for Play Store / banking apps. Frequent updates — check the homepage.

modules.name: Tricky Store
modules.description: Spoofs keystore attestation. Useful for apps that key off Strong Integrity.

modules.name: Zygisk Detach
modules.description: Detaches Play Store updates from specific apps so they don't auto-update behind your back.
